surprises.title: Welcome aboard, Bunny! 🚢
surprises.message: I love you so much! This is gonna be the best vacation ever!

surprises.title: Good Morning, My Love 💕
surprises.message: Happy Anniversary, Holly. One year older, one year more beautiful. Today is for you — champagne at breakfast, spa morning, and dinner under the stars tonight. I love you more than you know.

surprises.title: A Little Secret 🥂
surprises.message: There's a bottle of champagne chilling at the butler's station. Ask for it before you get ready for dinner. You deserve it.

surprises.title: Tonight's Show 🎭
surprises.message: We have priority Haven seating for Rocket Man tonight — Elton John tribute, 9pm. Your seat is already reserved. Get dressed up — we're going out.

surprises.title: Roatán Morning ☀️
surprises.message: Happy Tuesday, love. Today we explore Roatán. The water is turquoise and the tenders start at 8:30. Sunscreen on, adventure mode on.

surprises.title: Last Morning 🌊
surprises.message: Last morning at sea. You made this trip magical, Holly. Thank you for seven days of saying yes to everything — the excursions, the food, the late nights. I'd sail with you anywhere.
